_note: Supplementary reference materials, web/handbook-verified typical property ranges. points = [density(g/cm3), yield(MPa), uts(MPa), elongation(%), modulus(GPa), hardness(HV), thermal_conductivity(W/mK)] per condition; ranges are computed from these. Conservative published values, not fabricated.

materials.industry_note: 북미 표준 구조용 강. AISC LRFD/ASD code 의 기준 grade. 빌딩 콜럼, 빔, 보, 베이스 플레이트, 그릴/그레이팅, 농기계 부품. EU equiv: S275JR (EN 10025-2). 한국 KS equiv: SS400 / SM400.

materials.name: ASTM A572 Grade 50 (HSLA structural)

materials.industry_note: Extra Low Interstitial 의료 임플란트 grade. 일반 Grade 5 대비 O ≤0.13 / N ≤0.03 / Fe ≤0.25 / H ≤0.0125 로 interstitial 제한 → 저온 fracture toughness ↑. 인공관절 femoral stem, 척추 cage, 치과 implant abutment, cryogenic vessel (-320°C) 적용. AMS 4907, ASTM F136, MIL F-83142.

materials.name: C10200 (Oxygen-Free Copper, KS C1020)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5101 strip 표준 grade. 99.99% pure OFC — 진공/수소 분위기 annealing 가능 (hydrogen embrittlement 회피). Coaxial cable, bus bar, automotive rectifier, sputtering target, 반도체 heat sink. IACS 101% — pure ETP (C11000, 100% IACS) 와 거의 동등.

materials.name: C10300 (Phosphorus-Deoxidized Low-P Copper, DLP)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5101 strip. P 0.001~0.005% 첨가로 hydrogen embrittlement 회피, 진공 brazing 가능 (C1020 다음으로 진공 분위기 응용 표준). 가스 배관 (LP/도시가스), 핵 reactor 의 일부 copper part, 정밀 conductor.

materials.name: C12200 (Phosphorus-Deoxidized High-P Copper, DHP)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5101 strip. P 0.015~0.040% (high) — 진공 brazing, 가스 배관, gaskets, 라디에이터, marine oil cooler, switch, casting mold. ASME Sec.II Part B C12200 으로 ASME pressure vessel application 도 가능. IACS 85% (C1020 의 84%).

materials.name: C21000 (Red Brass 95Cu-5Zn, Gilding Metal)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5101 RB1. 95Cu-5Zn red brass — coin (한국은행 10원 화폐 일부), fuse cap, connector, bullet jacket (full metal jacket bullet), 모터 rotor bar. 대기·민물·해수 부식 저항 우수. IACS 56% (Cu 의 절반 정도).

materials.name: C22000 (Red Brass 90Cu-10Zn, Commercial Bronze)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5101 RB2. 90Cu-10Zn — bolt, chain link, 장식·jewelry, 악기 일부. Red brass 의 색감 (24K 금에 가까움) 으로 cosmetic 응용도. IACS 44%.

materials.name: C23000 (Red Brass 85Cu-15Zn)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5101 RB3. 85Cu-15Zn — zipper, AC 모터 rotor bar, 정밀 ferrule, 일부 hardware. Red brass 영역의 마지막 grade — 더 high-Zn 으로 가면 Yellow Brass (C26000 70/30) 영역. IACS 37%.

materials.name: C26800 (Yellow Brass 66Cu-34Zn)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5101 BA grade. 66Cu-34Zn — 표준 Yellow Brass. switch contact, radiator core tube, 음향 instrument (트럼펫 등). C2600 (70/30) 보다 약간 lower Cu — 비용 trade-off. IACS 27%.

materials.name: AISI 4140 (Cr-Mo, alias 42CrMo4)
materials.industry_note: MMPDS-08 Table 2.3.1.0(c1)~(c3) 의 design allowables (HT-125 / HT-150) — FAA 항공 허용치 S-Basis. 단, MMPDS 표준은 'user heat-treated parts' 라 실제 lot tensile test 로 minimum substantiation 필수.

materials.name: Grade 91 (P91, 9Cr-1MoVNb)
conditions: Quenched 1040°C + Tempered 760°C (ASME B&PV Sec.II Pt.D, boiler tube spec)

materials.name: SS410 (UNS S41000) — valve trim, pump shaft
materials.industry_note: API 6A/600 trim spec (e.g. trim no. 8/8A); butterfly/gate/globe valve disks, pump impellers and shafts.

materials.name: SS420 (UNS S42000) — cutlery, surgical, nozzle
materials.industry_note: ASTM A276 standard for cutlery, surgical instruments, dental/surgical scalpels, sand-blast nozzles, gauge blocks.

materials.name: SS440C (UNS S44004) — premium bearing & blade
materials.industry_note: ASTM A276 high-carbon Cr SS for rolling-element bearings (knife-edge balls), valves, surgical instruments, premium kitchen knives.

materials.name: M50 (AMS 6491, T11350) — aircraft engine bearing
materials.industry_note: Standard for jet-engine mainshaft bearings (J57, F100/F110, GE90 family); AMS 6491 / 6490; replaced by M50-NiL for case-carb variant.

materials.name: AISI 9310 (VIM-VAR) — aerospace transmission gear
conditions: Case-Carburized 0.8 mm + Q+T (case ~720 HV, core ~360 HV)
materials.industry_note: Standard for helicopter transmission gears (Apache, Black Hawk), jet-engine accessory gearboxes; AMS 6260 / 6265 (VIM-VAR).

materials.name: 22MnB5 (USIBOR 1500) — hot-stamped automotive PHS
conditions: Austenitized + H2O quenched + AlSi coated (post-PHS, peak martensite, σy 1100)
ref_urls: ANSYS Granta — Press hardening steel 22MnB5 (BS EN 10083-3:2006), high ductility + austenized & H2O quenched (coated/uncoated)

sources.label: ANSYS Granta + ArcelorMittal — 22MnB5 USIBOR 1500 (EN 1.5530, BS EN 10083-3)

materials.heat_treatment: Hot-stamped (austenitize 900°C + H2O quench) — peak martensite condition
materials.industry_note: Industry standard for hot-stamped (press-hardened) B-pillar, door-impact beam, bumper beam, side member; Al-Si coated for high-temp oxidation. KIC pre-PHS 44 MPa√m → post-PHS 122-176 MPa√m (3× ↑ via martensite refinement). 한국 채택: 현대·기아 차체 PHS 부품 (Sonata, Avante, EV6 등).

materials.name: ASTM A536 Ductile Iron 80-55-06 (general purpose)
ref_urls: ASTM A536-84 Standard Specification for Ductile Iron Castings

sources.label: ASTM A536 + Portland Bolt — Ductile Iron 80-55-06 (UTS 552 / YS 379 / El 6%)

materials.industry_note: ASTM A536 의 가장 보편적 grade. 자동차 cranksaft, hub, brake caliper, agricultural housing, pipe fitting, hillside washer. SG iron / nodular cast iron 으로 회주철 대비 5-10× 충격 강도. 한국 KS D 4302 GCD500 equiv.

materials.name: ASTM A536 Ductile Iron 100-70-03 (high-strength)

sources.label: ASTM A536 — Ductile Iron 100-70-03 (UTS 690 / YS 483 / El 3%)

materials.industry_note: 고강도 ductile iron. 자동차 differential housing, gear, suspension knuckle, off-highway 차량 idler. KS D 4302 GCD700 equiv.

materials.name: DP780 — dual-phase automotive structural
materials.industry_note: WorldAutoSteel AHSS standard; martensite-in-ferrite microstructure; used for rocker panels, side members, A/B-pillar reinforcements (cold-formable, weldable).

materials.name: SA213 T22 (2.25Cr-1Mo) — boiler superheater tube
materials.industry_note: ASME SA-213/A335 P22 boiler/header workhorse; subcritical & supercritical fossil plants, refinery reactor walls (H2 service per API 941 Nelson curve).

materials.name: Super 304H (S30432, Nb-Cu strengthened 18Cr-9Ni)
materials.industry_note: USC (ultra-supercritical) boiler superheater & reheater tubing (≥600°C steam); ASME Code Case 2328; Sumitomo SUPER304H / Salzgitter / Nippon.

materials.name: SA508 Grade 3 Class 1 — reactor pressure vessel
materials.industry_note: PWR reactor pressure vessel forgings (head, shell, nozzle), steam generator channel head; ASME Sec III NB; KEPIC-MN; tracks ΔRTNDT for embrittlement.

materials.name: Zircaloy-4 (R60804) — PWR fuel cladding
ref_urls: ASTM B353 / B811 PWR fuel cladding spec
materials.heat_treatment: Mill annealed (RXA) — standard PWR fuel cladding condition
materials.industry_note: ASTM B353 PWR fuel rod cladding (Westinghouse/AREVA); low neutron absorption σa ≈ 0.18 b; superseded for advanced PWR by ZIRLO™ / M5® but still standard. Density 6.56 g/cc, Tm 1850°C, Poisson 0.37 (낮은 ν 으로 hydride blister 대응).

materials.name: SA516 Grade 70 / P355N (pressure vessel HSLA)
ref_urls: ANSYS Granta — HSLA P355N/NH normalized (UNS K02700, ASME SA516 Gr70)
ASTM A516/A516M Spec for Pressure Vessel Plates, Carbon Steel

sources.label: ANSYS Granta + ASME — SA516 Gr70 / EN P355N (UNS K02700, EN 1.0562)

materials.heat_treatment: Normalized (915°C / air cool) — standard PV plate condition (ASME Sec.II Pt.A)
materials.industry_note: ASME B&PV Sec.II Pt.D 의 carbon steel pressure vessel 표준 grade. JIS SM490B / KS SM490 등가. 정유시설 atmospheric tower, hydrogen reformer, ammonia synthesis loop, LNG vaporizer pressure shell, steam header. -10°C 에서도 Charpy 100J+. KIC ≈ 80 MPa√m → leak-before-break design 가능. POSCO, Nippon Steel, Tata Steel 표준 plate.

materials.name: Armox 600T (SSAB armor steel)
materials.industry_note: 최고 hardness armor 강 (570-640 HBW), 4-20 mm 두께. 군용 add-on plate, VIP 차량 도어, 보안 vault, infrastructure 보호. Charpy -40°C 12J (transverse). 후처리 가공 불가 (delivered condition 만 사용). MIL-A-46100 / MIL-DTL-46177 equiv. 한국 채택: 일부 무기체계 add-on armor.

materials.name: 9% Ni Steel (ASTM A553 Type I) — LNG tank
materials.industry_note: Toughness retained to -196°C; standard for LNG storage tank inner shell (Moss/membrane), ASME Sec VIII Div 1 Para UHA, IGC code; KOGAS/KEPIC.

materials.name: AH36 (ABS/DNV high-tensile hull steel)
materials.industry_note: ABS / DNV / LR / KR / ClassNK harmonized standard for ship hull main structure (deck, side shell, bulkhead, longitudinal); CVN at -20°C (DH36) / -40°C (EH36) / -60°C (FH36).

materials.name: SAE 21-4N (NCF3) — automotive exhaust valve
materials.industry_note: Standard exhaust-valve face material in gasoline & light-diesel engines (Toyota / Honda / Bosch); replaces silchrome (21-2N) for higher hot strength; SAE J775.

materials.name: AA 2219 (Al-Cu-Mn-V, cryogenic propellant tank)
materials.industry_note: Saturn V S-IC, Space Shuttle ET, SLS core stage, Falcon 9 second-stage LOX tank; weldable Al-Cu (FSW); retains strength to -253°C (LH2).

materials.name: MP35N (UNS R30035, Co-Ni-Cr-Mo)
materials.industry_note: ASTM F562 medical lead/pacemaker conductor wire; AMS 5844 aerospace high-strength fasteners (Hi-Lok); non-magnetic, immune to chloride SCC, σ_UTS > Inconel 718.

materials.name: NAK80 (Daido) — pre-hardened mirror-finish mold steel
materials.industry_note: Daido Steel proprietary; standard for high-gloss / mirror-finish plastic injection molds (cosmetic compacts, optical lens, LCD light guides); EDM-friendly, weldable, polishable to Ra < 0.01 μm.

materials.name: STAVAX ESR (Uddeholm, ≈ AISI 420 mod) — corrosion-resistant mold
conditions: Hardened (1020°C oil Q + 200°C T, max hardness)
materials.industry_note: ESR-melted clean; standard for medical / optical / PVC / fluoropolymer molds where corrosive monomer or chloride water-cooling lines would pit P20.

materials.name: Music Wire (ASTM A228) — piano-wire spring
materials.industry_note: ASTM A228 high-carbon patented cold-drawn; static & cyclic compression springs (clock, valve, retractable pen); piano string. Size-dependent strength per Schubert.

materials.name: Chrome-Silicon (ASTM A401) — valve-spring oil-tempered
materials.industry_note: ASTM A401 standard for automotive engine valve springs (high-cycle fatigue ≥ 10^8 at σ_a ≈ 500 MPa), clutch springs; Si retards tempering softening to 230°C operating service.

materials.name: HY-100 (MIL-S-16216) — submarine pressure hull
materials.industry_note: USN submarine pressure hull (Los Angeles → Virginia → Seawolf class) and surface combatants; CVN ≥ 81 J at −18°C, low-H welding (MIL-E-22200/10).

materials.name: SA336 F22V Class 3 (V-modified 2.25Cr-1Mo) — hydroprocessing reactor
materials.industry_note: Heavy-wall hydroprocessing reactor (hydrocracker, hydrotreater) shells per API 934-A; V/Cb stable carbides retard creep & H₂ disbonding (Nelson curve > P22 base).

materials.name: API 5L X65 PSL2 (Offshore sour-service line pipe)
materials.industry_note: Offshore subsea pipeline workhorse (Gulf of Mexico, North Sea, pre-salt); NACE MR0175 HIC/SSC qualified; max H₂S service to ~0.1 bar partial pressure.

materials.name: API 5L X70 PSL2 (Gas-transmission pipeline)
materials.industry_note: Long-distance gas trunkline workhorse (West-East China, Nord Stream, TANAP); CTOD ≥ 0.25 mm at -20°C for arrest of running brittle fracture.

materials.name: L80 Type 13Cr (UNS S42000) — sour-service OCTG
conditions: Q+T (980°C oil Q + 700°C T, σy min)
materials.industry_note: API 5CT L80 13Cr standard for CO₂-rich sweet gas wells (no free H₂S); workhorse for gas production tubing in Middle East / Sichuan basin; NACE MR0175 < 10 ppm H₂S.

materials.name: Hadfield Manganese Steel (Mn13, ASTM A128 Grade B)
materials.industry_note: Cast 100+ years; jaw-crusher liner, cone crusher mantle, railway switch frog/crossing, dragline bucket teeth, dredge cutter heads; HV doubles under impact (work-hardening γ→α' transformation).

materials.name: AA 5083-H321 (marine / LNG inner-tank Al)
materials.industry_note: ABS / DNV approved for ship superstructure, LNG carrier inner tank (IMO Type-B), high-speed catamaran hull, cryogenic ground tanks (-196°C retention); Mg saturation gives SCC risk above 65°C.

materials.name: AA 2024-T351 (aerospace fuselage skin)
materials.industry_note: Standard fuselage skin & lower wing panel for Boeing 737/747/757, Airbus A320 family, McDonnell DC-10; Alclad variant gives corrosion-cladding for marine atmosphere.

materials.name: AA 7050-T7451 (aerospace forging / thick plate)
conditions: T7451 (Overaged for SCC resistance, peak fracture toughness)
materials.industry_note: Standard for thick aircraft forgings & plate ≥ 50 mm: F/A-18, F-22, F-35 main spars; Boeing 777 wing rib; lower SCC sensitivity than 7075 makes T7451 preferred for thick-section.

materials.name: Ti-13V-11Cr-3Al (B120-VCA, 1st-gen β-titanium)
materials.industry_note: First commercial β-Ti; SR-71 Blackbird airframe (~93% of structure), Lockheed A-12; fast-aging to ω makes precision heat-treat critical; ω-embrittlement at room temp limits modern use.

materials.name: Pyrowear 53 (Carpenter, AMS 6308) — helicopter transmission gear
conditions: Case-Carburized 0.6~1.0 mm + Q+T (case HV 740, core HV 360)
materials.industry_note: AMS 6308; UH-60 Black Hawk, AH-64 Apache, CH-47 Chinook main rotor gearbox standard; retains case strength to 315°C (vs. 9310 limit ~150°C) for loss-of-lube survival.

materials.name: MAR-M 247 — aerospace blade & turbo wheel
materials.industry_note: Standard cast nickel for GE F404/F414 turbine blade (1st-2nd stage), automotive racing turbocharger wheel (F1, Le Mans, WRC), industrial GT first-stage; γ' volume ~62% provides creep strength to 950°C.

materials.name: Udimet 720Li (low-interstitial, P/M disc)
materials.industry_note: Rolls-Royce Trent 500/700/800/900 HP & IP turbine disc; Pratt&Whitney F119/F135; γ' ~45% balances creep, LCF and burst margin at 650-700°C; Li (Low-Interstitial) variant minimizes B/C for forgeability.

materials.name: AISI 8620 (automotive case-hardening gear)
materials.industry_note: Automotive transmission ring gear & pinion, wind-turbine planet/sun gear (NREL 1.5 MW reference design), industrial gearbox; AMS 6274 aerospace, NACE compatible; widely substituted by 18CrNiMo7-6 in EU.

materials.name: R260 Rail Steel (UIC 860 / EN 13674-1) — railway head
materials.industry_note: UIC 860 / EN 13674-1 standard rail head, profiles 60E1 / 60E2 / 54E1; KORAIL / DB / SNCF / JR mainline; surface RCF (rolling-contact fatigue) life governed by HHT depth ≥15 mm.

materials.name: Railway Wheel Class C (AAR M-107) — heavy-haul
materials.industry_note: AAR M-107/M-208 standard for heavy-haul freight wheels (BHP iron-ore, Vale Carajás, BNSF coal); rim hardness 321~363 BHN balances tread wear (vs Class B 277 BHN softer) and shelling resistance.

materials.name: RHA (Rolled Homogeneous Armor, MIL-A-46100) — combat vehicle armor
materials.industry_note: MIL-A-46100E ballistic homogeneous armor plate; M1 Abrams hull/turret structural skin, M2 Bradley IFV, Stryker, AMV; CVN ≥27J at -40°C; V₅₀ vs 7.62×54R B32 AP ≈ 850 m/s @ 12 mm thickness.

materials.name: D6AC (Ultra-High Strength Low-Alloy) — missile motor case
conditions: Q+T (245°C low temper, σ_UTS ≈ 1900 MPa class)
Q+T (425°C standard temper, balance of strength + toughness)
materials.industry_note: Minuteman III / Peacekeeper / Trident D-5 second-stage solid-rocket motor case; F-111 wing pivot fitting; B-1B main landing gear; high σ_y/ρ for filament-wound replacement reservoir.

materials.name: HP 9-4-30 (9Ni-4Co-0.3C) — aircraft landing gear
conditions: Q+T (815°C oil Q + 510°C T, peak σy)
materials.industry_note: F-14 / F-15 / F-16 / F/A-18 main landing gear, missile housing; Co-Ni martensite with secondary M₂C carbide gives σ_UTS 1620 MPa + KIC 110 MPa√m (vs 300M 60 MPa√m); AMS 6526.

materials.name: 38MnVS6 (microalloyed forging) — automotive crankshaft
materials.industry_note: BMW B57, VW EA288, MAN D2868 crankshaft & connecting rod standard; V-microalloyed pearlite-ferrite from forge heat saves ~50% cost vs 4140 Q+T (no separate heat-treat); free-machining S-modification (BY-mark).

materials.name: A992 (US wide-flange beam, ASTM A992)
materials.industry_note: ASTM A992 standard W-shape (W6 ~ W44) for ALL US structural steel framing since 2002 (superseded A36 / A572); One World Trade Center, Salesforce Tower, Empire State Building upgrades, US highway bridges.

materials.name: S355J2+N (EN 10025-2, EU mild structural)
materials.industry_note: EU workhorse for bridges (Øresund, Millau, Stonecutters), wind-turbine towers (Vestas V90/V112, Siemens SWT-3.6), ship hull (Damen), crane jib (Liebherr); CVN ≥27 J at -20°C (J2 sub-grade).

materials.name: S690QL (EN 10025-6, high-strength Q+T)
materials.industry_note: Crane boom (Liebherr LTM 1750-9.1 1300 t), excavator stick (Cat 6090 FS), mining haul truck chassis (Komatsu 980E-5), high-strength bridge truss; weldable with preheat 100°C.

materials.name: Hardox 450 (SSAB abrasion-resistant)
conditions: Q+T thin plate (≤10 mm, higher BHN)
materials.industry_note: SSAB proprietary; standard for dump-truck haul body (Komatsu HD785-7, Cat 793F), excavator bucket liner (Cat 6020B), feeder pan, crusher hopper, dredger cutter; 3× abrasion life of mild S275.

materials.name: AISI 9260 (Si-Mn leaf spring)
materials.industry_note: Heavy-truck multi-leaf and parabolic leaf spring (Hino, Tata, Volvo FH), agricultural plough disc (John Deere), military trailer; 2% Si retards tempering softening, σ_relax low to 230°C.

materials.name: D2 Tool Steel (AISI D2, cold-work die)
conditions: Hardened (1020°C oil Q + 200°C T, peak HV)
materials.industry_note: Most-used cold-work tool steel worldwide; stamping & blanking die (auto body panel), slitter knife, thread roll, cold-header punch, knife blade (Bohler K110, Uddeholm Sverker 21, Hitachi SLD); high Cr gives oxidation resistance vs O1.

materials.name: AISI H21 (Hot-Work Tungsten tool)
conditions: Q+T (1175°C oil Q + 620°C T, room temp peak)
materials.industry_note: Heavy forging die for hot-forged steel & superalloy (turbine disc preform), Al extrusion die mandrel, hot-header punch, hot-shear blade; 9% W maintains hot-hardness HV ≥ 400 to 650°C (vs H13 limit ~580°C).

materials.name: NARLOY-Z (Cu-3Ag-0.5Zr) — SSME chamber
materials.industry_note: Space Shuttle Main Engine (SSME / RS-25) main combustion chamber liner with cooling channels (LH2 regenerative); RS-25E on SLS Block 1B, Aerojet RL10C; Zr stabilizes grain boundary at 800K + Ag for high thermal-k.

materials.name: GRCop-84 (Cu-8Cr-4Nb, NASA dispersion-strengthened)
materials.industry_note: NASA Glenn dispersion-strengthened Cu (Cr₂Nb particles pin grain boundary); RAMPT additive-manufactured 2nd-gen thrust chamber liner (vs NARLOY-Z); Raptor V2 main injector candidate; superior creep at >600°C.

materials.name: AA 2195 (Al-Cu-Li-Mg-Ag) — SLS LH2 tank
materials.industry_note: Super-Lightweight External Tank (SLWT, STS-91+ Shuttle), SLS Block 1 core stage LH2 + LOX tank, Falcon 9 second-stage interstage; 5% lighter and 30% stiffer than 2219; FSW-friendly.

materials.name: AA 2050 (Al-Cu-Li, 3rd-gen) — Airbus A380 wing
materials.industry_note: Constellium AIRWARE; A380 lower wing skin, A350 fuselage frame, A220 wing rib; 6% mass save vs 2024-T351 with higher KIC; quench-insensitive thick-section T84 ageing.

materials.name: API 2H Grade 50 (offshore platform jacket)
materials.industry_note: Offshore jacket leg, brace, can / chord node (Shell Mars / Mensa, Statoil Snorre, BP Atlantis); North Sea / GoM CTOD ≥ 0.25 mm at -10°C; ASTM-equiv A572 Gr.50 with tighter CVN.

materials.name: S275JR (EN 10025-2, EU basic structural)
materials.industry_note: EU general-purpose mild structural workhorse (warehouse columns, low-rise building, gates, fences, conveyor frame, agricultural machinery chassis); ~95% of European general-fabrication tonnage; CVN ≥ 27 J at +20°C only.

materials.name: ASTM A537 Class 2 (cryogenic LPG / refrigerated tank)
materials.industry_note: Refrigerated LPG / NH₃ atmospheric storage spheres (Statoil Mongstad, Shell), refrigerated LNG carrier deck cargo tank, propane bullets; ASME Sec VIII Div 1 / IIA-3.8; CVN ≥27 J at -45°C.

materials.name: SHN275 (KS D 3866, seismic H-section)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3866 내진 건축구조용 H형강 (한국 자체 표준). 항복비 (YR=YS/UTS) ≤ 85% 강제 → 항복 후 가공경화 여유 확보, 내진 ductility 핵심. Charpy 27J @ 0°C. CE ≤ 0.36%, Pcm ≤ 0.25%. 한국 고층 건축·내진 brace 표준. JIS G 3136 SN275 와 동일 base.

materials.name: SHN355 (KS D 3866, seismic H-section)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3866 내진 H형강 중급. 항복비 ≤85%. Charpy 27J @ 0°C. CE ≤ 0.44%, Pcm ≤ 0.26%. 한국 고층 건축 표준 (SM490 대체 추세) — Hyundai Steel 인천 condo · 광화문 등. Nb+V ≤ 0.15% (micro-alloy).

materials.name: SHN420 (KS D 3866, seismic H-section)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3866 내진 H형강 고강도. 항복비 ≤85%. Charpy 47J @ -5°C (one tier higher than SHN275/355). CE ≤ 0.45%, Pcm ≤ 0.27%. 한국 50층+ 초고층 / 대형 spans.

materials.name: SHN460 (KS D 3866, seismic H-section)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3866 내진 H형강 최고강도. 항복비 ≤85%. Charpy 47J @ -5°C. CE ≤ 0.45%, Pcm ≤ 0.29%. 한국 100층+ 초고층 (예: Lotte World Tower) · 대형 stadium roof truss · 풍력 tower.

materials.name: SD400 (KS D 3504, deformed concrete rebar)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 콘크리트 보강용 철근 표준 grade — 한국 RC 콘크리트 보강 기본. UTS = YP × 1.15 min (≥460). El ≥ 16% (No.2호 시편). Bend 180° / 2d (D ≤ 25). ASTM A615 Grade 60 (60 ksi = 414 MPa) 등가. 한국 주택·상가·교량 90% 이상이 SD400.

materials.name: SD500 (KS D 3504, high-strength deformed rebar)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 고강도 철근. UTS = YP × 1.08 min (≥540). El ≥ 18%. Bend 180° / 4d. 고층 (50층+) 건축 · 대형 spans / 길이 단축 효과. ASTM A615 G75 등가.

materials.name: SD400W (KS D 3504, weldable rebar, CE-controlled)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 W = Weldable. CE (탄소당량) ≤ 0.50% 제한으로 현장 용접 가능. UTS = YP × 1.15 min. 철골 + RC 복합구조 · 철근 splicing 시 용접 이음 가능. ASTM A706 G60 (low-alloy weldable rebar) 등가.

materials.name: SD500W (KS D 3504, weldable high-strength rebar, CE-controlled)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 W = Weldable + 고강도. CE ≤ 0.50%. UTS = YP × 1.15 min. 고강도 + 용접 조합. ASTM A706 G75 등가.

materials.name: SD400S (KS D 3504, seismic rebar, YR ≤ 1.25)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 S = Seismic 내진. UTS = YP × 1.25 min (more conservative than SD400/W). 항복비 (YR=Re/Rm) ≤ 1.25 제한 → 항복 plateau 길게 유지 + uniform plasticity. Bend 90° / 4d (더 가혹). 한국 내진 등급 1·2 건물 의무. 대구 KTX 역사 / Lotte Mall 등.

materials.name: SD500S (KS D 3504, seismic high-strength rebar, YR ≤ 1.25)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 S = Seismic 고강도 내진. UTS = YP × 1.25 min. 항복비 ≤ 1.25. 한국 50층+ 내진 등급 특A 건물 (예: Le Meilleur Jongno Tower) · 원전 격납고. 미국 A706 G75 Seismic 등가.

materials.name: SM490A (KS D 3515, weldable structural steel)
conditions: As-rolled, t≤16 mm (suffix A = no Charpy req.)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3515 용접구조용 강 — 한국 다리·선박·건축 구조 표준 (SS400 대체 추세). YS 285 (t≤16) / 275 (16<t≤40). UTS 490-610. EN S355JR / ASTM A572 G50 등가. 수만 t / 년 사용.

materials.name: SM490B (KS D 3515, weldable structural steel, 0°C Charpy)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3515 용접구조 + Charpy 27J @ 0°C (B suffix). C 함량 단계적 감축 (0.18% max). 일반 다리 · 선박 hull · 압력 vessel (저온 응용 제외). EN S355J0 등가.

materials.name: SM490C (KS D 3515, weldable structural steel, -20°C Charpy)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3515 용접구조 + Charpy 27J @ -20°C (C suffix). 한국 동절기 노출 outdoor 구조 (인천대교 / Lotte World Tower frame / 풍력 tower / LPG 탱크). EN S355J2 등가.

materials.name: SS275 (KS D 3503, general structural rolled steel)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3503 일반구조용 압연강재 — 신 KS 표기 (구 SS400 → SS275 매핑). YS 275 (t≤16) / 265 (16<t≤40). UTS 410-550 (t≤16). EN S275JR / ASTM A283 C 등가. 가장 흔한 한국 일반구조용 강 (배관 support / shelving / 일반 frame).

materials.name: SS315 (KS D 3503, general structural rolled steel)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3503 일반구조용 중강도. YS 315 (t≤16) / 305 (16<t≤40). 일반 frame · 농기계 · 컨테이너 frame. EN S315MC 등가.

materials.name: SAPH440 (JIS G 3113 / KS D 3519, automotive structural hot-rolled)
materials.industry_note: JIS G 3113 / KS D 3519 자동차 구조용 hot rolled — 현대·기아 OEM. YS 305 (t≤14) / 295 (depth-dependent), UTS 440 min, El 24% (No.5 시편). 차체 frame · chassis · suspension arm · cross-member. EN S355MC 등가.

materials.name: SPFH590 (JIS G 3134 / KS D 3519, automotive HSLA hot-rolled)
materials.industry_note: JIS G 3134 / KS D 3519 자동차 고장력 — 현대·기아 OEM door inner / chassis / cross-member / suspension arm. YS 420 min, UTS 590 min, El 19% (Lo=80mm). 무게 감량 + 충돌 안전 — 차체 강성 ↑. EN S500MC 등가. SPFH540 보다 1 grade 강하고 SPFH590Y (YS controlled) 도 있음.

materials.name: SHP275W (KS F 4603, weldable steel sheet pile)
materials.industry_note: KS F 4603 강널 (Steel Sheet Pile) — 토목 흙막이 / 항만 안벽 / 가물막이. W = Weldable (CE 제한). 280-460 MPa 범위. 한국 토목 표준 — 항만공사 / 지하철 굴착 (서울 9호선 등) / 강변 정비. 기존 SHP275 보다 용접성 ↑.

materials.name: SHP355W (KS F 4603, high-strength weldable sheet pile)
materials.industry_note: KS F 4603 고강도 강널. 대형 토목 / 지하 5층 이상 굴착 / 해상풍력 monopile. SM490 동급 강도 + 강널 형상. 잠실 롯데월드타워 / 송도 신도시 지하 공사.

materials.name: SHP450W (KS F 4603, ultra-high-strength weldable sheet pile)
materials.industry_note: KS F 4603 초고강도 강널. 대심도 굴착 / 해저터널 / 해상풍력 jacket. SM570 동급 강도. 두께 절감 (~30%) → 시공 비용 ↓ + 운반 효율 ↑. 인천 영종도 / 부산항 신항.

materials.name: SGCC (KS D 3506 / JIS G 3302, hot-dip galvanized commercial steel)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3506 용융아연도금강판 — 한국 건축 외장 (지붕·외장 panel) / 가전 (냉장고·세탁기 외판) / 자동차 underbody. Z140 (140 g/m²) ~ Z275 (275 g/m²) 양면 합 부착량. 가성비 최고 — 한국 SGCC 연 100만 t+ 생산.

materials.name: SGC400 / SGC295Y (KS D 3506, hot-dip galvanized HSLA)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3506 고장력 도금강판 (HX300LAD+Z 등가). 자동차 outer body 도장 전 substrate / 가전 고급 외장 / 건축 sandwich panel. 강도 + 부식 저항 동시. 일반 SGCC 대비 강도 50% ↑ → 두께 절감 가능.

materials.name: STK490 (KS D 3566 / JIS G 3444, structural carbon steel tube)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3566 일반구조용 강관 — 한국 건축 frame / 공장 column / scaffolding / 가드레일 / 가로등 기둥. SM490 의 강관 형태. EN 10210 S355 등가. SGT490 (가스용) 으로도 표기.

materials.name: STKM13B (KS D 3517 / JIS G 3445, machine structural cold-drawn tube)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3517 기계구조용 강관 — 정밀 기계 부품 / 유압 cylinder / 자동차 propeller shaft / 자전거 frame. Cold drawn → 표면 정도 ↑ + 치수 정도 ↑. SAE 1020 등가. 한국 자전거 (Samchully · Alton) / 운동기구 frame 표준.

materials.name: SG325 (KS D 3533 / JIS G 3116, steel plate for gas cylinders)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3533 가스용기용 강판. LPG 가스통 / CNG 차량 연료 tank / 산소·아세틸렌 실린더. 충격 인성 강조 (저온 Charpy). 한국 가스公社 LPG 표준 + KGS 인증. ASME SA516 G70 보다 약간 약하나 한국 LPG 통 표준.

materials.name: SPA-H (KS D 3542 / JIS G 3125, atmospheric corrosion-resistant steel)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3542 / JIS G 3125 내후성 강 (Cor-Ten 등가) — Cu·Cr·Ni 첨가로 산화막 stabilization → 대기 부식 4~8배 ↓. 도장 없이 사용 가능 (산화 cosmetic patina). 한국 인천대교 / 행복도시 (세종) 다리 / 부산 부산항대교 일부. ASTM A242 / EN S355J0WP 등가.

materials.name: SD600 (KS D 3504, ultra-high-strength deformed rebar)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 초고강도 철근. UTS = YP × 1.08 min (≥648). El ≥ 12%. Bend 180° / 4d. 한국 100층+ 초고층 (Lotte World Tower 일부) / 대형 spans / RC 면적 절감 (자재비 ↓). ASTM A615 G80 등가.

materials.name: SM275A (KS D 3515, weldable structural steel)
conditions: As-rolled, t≤16 mm (suffix A = no Charpy req.)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3515 용접구조용 강 — 중경량 다리·산업 frame 표준. EN S275JR / ASTM A283 C 등가. SM490 이전 단계, 비용 ↓.

materials.name: SM355B (KS D 3515, weldable structural steel, 0°C Charpy)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3515 용접구조용 + EN S355 등가. 한국 다리 (서해대교 일부) · 풍력 tower · LNG carrier hull. SM490 보다 1 등급 아래.

materials.name: SM420C (KS D 3515, high-strength weldable structural steel, -20°C Charpy)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3515 고강도 + 저온 인성. 인천대교 cable strand support / 해상풍력 tower 일부. SM355 보다 강도 ↑.

materials.name: SM570 (KS D 3515, TMCP ultra-high-strength weldable structural steel, -20°C Charpy)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3515 초고강도 + 저온. 한국 해양 / 풍력 tower / 초고층 frame. CE ≤ 0.44%, Pcm ≤ 0.28%. TMCP (Thermomechanical Controlled Process) 압연으로 제조. EN S460ML 등가.

materials.name: SD700 (KS D 3504, top-grade high-strength deformed rebar)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3504 최고강도 철근. UTS = YP × 1.08 min (≥756). El ≥ 10%. KS only — 미국 ASTM 에는 없음. 100층+ 초고층 (DMC 롯데캐슬 / 한강자이) / 원전 격납고 / 대형 LNG 저장 탱크.

materials.name: C51900 (Phosphor Bronze 6Sn, PB-1)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5506 인청동 (Phosphor Bronze) 표준. 6% Sn → spring 용 탄성 + 부식 저항. connector 핀 / spring contact / 마모 베어링 / EV 모터 commutator brush. P 가 deoxidizer 역할 + 미세 P-bronze 강화. 한국 KEC / 한국단자 / Foxconn 커넥터 OEM.

materials.name: C75200 (Nickel Silver 65Cu-18Ni-17Zn, German Silver)
materials.industry_note: 풍산 KS D 5102 양백 (Nickel Silver) 표준. Ni 18% / Zn ~17% → silver-like 색 + 강도. 일반 식기 (silverware 도금 base) / 음향 instrument (flute · saxophone) / 정밀 spring / fuse cap. Ni 가 Ag substitute 역할.

materials.name: SUP9 (KS D 3701 / JIS G 4801, Cr-Mn spring steel)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3701 스프링강 표준. 한국 자동차 leaf spring (트럭·버스 후축) / 농기계 spring / coil spring. Cr 추가로 경화능 ↑, Mn 으로 저비용 + 강도. SAE 5160 (1Cr-Mn-Si) 근사 등가.

materials.name: SUP10 (KS D 3701 / JIS G 4801, Cr-V spring steel)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3701 고급 스프링강. V 추가로 미세 carbide → 피로 강도 ↑. 고급 자동차 valve spring (디젤 엔진) / 정밀 coil spring / 핸드 도구 spring. SAE 6150 / DIN 50CrV4 등가.

materials.name: SK85 (KS D 3751 / JIS G 4401, carbon tool steel 0.85%C)
materials.industry_note: KS D 3751 탄소공구강. 0.85% C → 적당한 경도 + 인성. 칼날 (식칼 / 사냥용) / shear blade / 가위 / 핸드 도구 (chisel · plier 일부) / spring 일부. 한국 KIYOSHI / SEKI 식칼 가공 (단조 후 Q+T). EN C80W1 등가.

materials.name: Hot-dip Zn-Mg-Al coated steel (3% Mg, 4% Al ternary coating)
materials.industry_note: POSCO 독자 개발 (특허) 3원계 Zn-Mg-Al 도금 강판. 부식 저항 SGCC (Zn-only) 대비 5~10배 ↑ — Mg/Al 첨가로 산화막 안정화. 한국 건축 외장 / 태양광 module frame / 자동차 underbody (현대·기아) / 풍력 tower 외장. EN 표기 ZM 도금과 유사. POSCO 매출의 highest-margin coated product.

materials.name: API 5L X80 line pipe (TMCP, sour service capable)
materials.industry_note: POSCO TMCP API 5L X80 표준 — 천연가스 / 원유 송유관 표준. Sour service (H₂S) MS suffix 가능 (NACE MR0175). 한국 KOGAS 평택 LNG terminal / Saudi Aramco 송유관 export 표준. Ti·Nb micro-alloy 로 고강도 + 저 CE. ASTM A841 Grade B 등가.

materials.name: API 5L X70 line pipe (TMCP)
materials.industry_note: POSCO TMCP API 5L X70 — 중장거리 송유관 / 가스관 표준. 한국 SK Energy 울산 정유공장 송유관 / 일본 가스공사 (Tokyo Gas). X80 보다 1 grade 아래, 경제성 ↑. 미국 Trans-Alaska Pipeline 등가.

materials.name: TWIP1180 steel (Twinning-Induced Plasticity, high-Mn austenitic AHSS)
materials.industry_note: POSCO 독자 개발 TWIP steel (Twinning-Induced Plasticity) — 자동차 B-pillar / A-pillar / bumper. UTS 1180 + El 45% (동시 만족 = 무게 감량 + 충돌 안전 trade-off 해결). 18~22% Mn 으로 austenitic 유지 + twin slip mechanism. 현대 IONIQ / 기아 EV6 차체 구조용. 다른 1차 자료: POSCO 백서.

materials.name: DP980 dual-phase steel (VDA 239-100 CR980Y700T-DP)
materials.process: Cold Rolled + Continuous Annealed (Dual-Phase: Ferrite + Martensite)
materials.industry_note: POSCO DP980 (Dual-Phase 980) — 자동차 outer body / door inner / B-pillar inner. UTS 980 + El 12% — TRIP 보다 cold-formable. ArcelorMittal Usibor 1500 / TKS DP980 등가. 현대·기아 / Toyota / GM 표준 AHSS (Advanced High Strength Steel).

materials.name: ASTM A553 Type I (9% Ni cryogenic steel)
materials.industry_note: POSCO 9% Ni 강 — LNG 저장 tank (육상·해상) 표준 (LNG -162°C, LH2 -253°C 일부). Ni 9% 로 austenite 안정 + martensite-austenite duplex 구조 → 극저온 Charpy 100J+. 한국 KOGAS 통영 / 평택 LNG terminal / Daewoo Shipbuilding LNG carrier hull. ASTM A553 Type I / EN 1.5662 등가. 9-25% Ni 영역에서 가장 비용 효율적.

materials.name: CGO 0.27 mm grain-oriented electrical steel (3.2% Si, Goss texture)
materials.industry_note: POSCO CGO 0.27 mm — 변압기 core 표준. 3.0~3.2% Si → 전기저항 ↑ + magnetostriction ↓ + Goss orientation (110)[001]. 한국 효성 / LS전선 변압기 / Mitsubishi Heavy Industries HVDC convertor. 손실 ~0.85 W/kg @ 1.7 T 50Hz. 기존 자재 대비 efficiency 5~10% ↑.

materials.name: STS304L (KS D 3705 / JIS G 4304, low-carbon austenitic stainless)
materials.industry_note: POSCO SUS304L (low-C) — 한국 식품·의료·건축·반도체 장비 표준 austenitic 스테인리스. L = low-carbon (sensitization 회피). 화학 plant / LNG 저장 / 의료 임플란트 (단기) / 일반 주방 sink. 일본 SUS304L 동등. POSCO 부산 광양 stainless mill 표준 생산. AISI 304 의 KS 등가.

materials.name: STS316L (KS D 3705 / JIS G 4304, low-carbon Mo-bearing austenitic stainless)
materials.industry_note: POSCO SUS316L (low-C, Mo 첨가) — 304L 대비 부식 저항 강화. 해수 환경 / 의료 임플란트 (장기 — 인공관절·치과 implant) / 화학 plant 강산 / 식품 cleaning. Mo 2-3% → pitting / crevice corrosion 저항 ↑. PREN = Cr + 3.3Mo + 16N ≈ 25~28. 부산 광양 stainless mill 표준 생산.

materials.name: STS304 ULC (Ultra-Low-Carbon austenitic stainless, C ≤ 0.015)
materials.industry_note: KIST + POSCO 공동개발 ULC stainless — C ≤ 0.015 (304L 의 1/2). 반도체 wafer carrier / 의료 implant (인공관절 long-term) / 항공 우주 high-purity. 한국재료연구원 (KIST) 표준 spec.
